properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As the daylight breaks You're lighting up my way My soul awakes To give You all the praise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, I will trust in You I will keep praising You through the night I put my hope in You You are the One who gives me life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the way Jesus, You're the only way It doesn't matter what they say to me I believe in You And so I praise Jesus, I will give You praise It doesn't matter what may come at me I believe in You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You're taking all my fears And filling me with hope I know You're near Wherever I may go

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm holding on, I keep believing No matter what, I keep on singing Whoa, whoa 'Cause every chain, You are breaking So my heart, will keep on praising Whoa, whoa

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are the way Jesus, You're the only way It doesn't matter what they say to me I believe in You And so I praise Jesus, I will give You praise It doesn't matter what may come at me I believe in You (I believe in you ya)
